title: Schema Source Partition Date
description: Configuration for determining the partition date when querying this source

compile_dates.description: Whether or not to fetch the patition dates at compile time instead of runtime, this is true by default as it can significantly improve partitioning performance

expr.description: The expression to use to determine the partition date, be careful not to cast here as that will prevent partition pruning

interval.description: The interval used for partitioning, this will be used to determine the partition date range

use_event_dates.description: Whether or not to use the event dates as the partition dates

use_range.description: Whether or not to use a range for the partition date filter instead of a list
